scenarios.name: App launches clean to home screen
Home header is visible on launch
Post composer row is visible
Default category is Social
Feed refresh button is visible
Create Story card is visible in feed
For You tab is visible in social feed
Following tab is visible in social feed
Tap Following tab switches to following feed
Tap For You tab returns to For You feed
scenarios.expected: For You tab shows as active

scenarios.name: Tap composer opens keyboard
scenarios.expected: Keyboard appears after tapping text area

scenarios.name: Text can be typed in composer
Keyboard dismisses on Back
scenarios.expected: Keyboard closes and composer stays visible

scenarios.name: Text can be erased from composer
Empty post tap is blocked
scenarios.expected: Tapping Post with empty field does not crash or navigate away

scenarios.name: Module switcher opens on tap
Biz module option visible in switcher
Chat module option visible in switcher
Dismiss module switcher without switching
scenarios.expected: Back key closes switcher without navigating

scenarios.name: Social module retained after dismiss
Pull to refresh reloads feed
scenarios.expected: Feed refreshes without crash, Post visible

scenarios.name: Full post cycle — type text and tap Post
Composer resets after post submission
scenarios.expected: Composer row still visible and category retained

scenarios.name: Scroll feed down reveals content below composer
Create Story opens story creation screen
Back from story screen returns to feed

scenarios.name: Social filter tab restores default view

scenarios.name: Back from search input returns to messages list

App launches clean to home screen
Home screen confirms correct starting state
Navigation drawer opens via hamburger icon
Explore item is visible in drawer
Tap Explore navigates to Explore screen
Explore screen header is visible
Search bar is tappable via coordinate (hint text not in accessibility tree)
scenarios.expected: Search field becomes active and keyboard appears

scenarios.name: Type text into search bar
scenarios.expected: Typed text appears in search field

scenarios.name: Search results or no-results state is shown
scenarios.expected: Screen updates without crash (typed text not assertable in Flutter accessibility tree)

scenarios.name: Clear search text via Back key
Explore screen is still accessible after clearing search
Tap search bar again for second query
Type a second search query
Dismiss search keyboard with Back
scenarios.expected: Keyboard dismisses, Explore screen still visible
